message:
fix: eliminate tab switch blinking with eager terminal creation (#105)

Three changes to eliminate visual blink when switching terminal tabs:

1. Eagerly create terminal connections for ALL tabs on load (not just
   the active tab). This ensures content is pre-rendered and ready
   before a tab becomes visible.

2. Switch from display:block/none to visibility:visible/hidden for tab
   containers. This preserves container dimensions while hidden,
   preventing reflow when a tab becomes active.

3. Remove unnecessary fit() calls on tab switch. Since containers
   maintain their dimensions with visibility:hidden, no resize is
   needed when switching — just focus the terminal.

Window resize now fits ALL terminals (not just active) since all
containers maintain layout at all times.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
